action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Stubbs, Haywood, Moore Omokunde, Madison, Arney, Taylor, Goodwin, Rivera-Wagner, Roe, DeSmidt, Udell, Bare, Neubauer, Palmeri, Hong, Clancy, Fitzgerald, Joers, Miresse and Mayadev;
